# César Gómez — Frontend-Focused Senior Fullstack Developer

> Portfolio and professional profile for César Gómez (mrcego), a senior fullstack developer with a frontend focus and 13+ years of experience in Vue.js, Nuxt.js, TypeScript, and frontend architecture. Based in Colombia. Available for remote contract work from August 2026.

## Canonical URLs

- English: https://cesargomez.dev/
- Spanish: https://cesargomez.dev/es
- Vue developer (EN): https://cesargomez.dev/vue-frontend-developer
- Desarrollador Vue (ES): https://cesargomez.dev/es/desarrollador-vue
- Sitemap: https://cesargomez.dev/sitemap.xml

## Professional summary

César Gómez is a senior fullstack developer with a frontend focus. He builds high-performance web products with Vue 3, Nuxt 4, TypeScript, PrimeVue, and Tailwind CSS. He has led frontend architecture for ed-tech platforms serving 100,000+ students and contributed as a founding engineer on speech-based language learning products.

## Core expertise

- Vue.js and Nuxt.js (frontend architecture, SSR/SSG, performance)
- TypeScript and modern JavaScript
- Design systems, micro-frontends, and component libraries
- Fullstack delivery with Node.js ecosystems
- UI engineering, accessibility, and Web Vitals optimization

## Recent roles

- Founding Member | Senior Fullstack at LingoQuesto (2025–Aug 2026) — ed-tech, speech-based language practice
- Senior Frontend Developer at Colegium (2021–2025) — 100k+ students, micro-frontends, design system
- Additional experience across TISSINI, Zabud, Cuarto Pixel, and enterprise web products

## Availability

Open to senior frontend, fullstack, and architecture roles — contract and remote-friendly. Target availability: August 2026.
